decisions.summary: split_pr recommendation overridden: design-ssot registration must ship with the docs it registers (head 8901e58)
decisions.reason: The design-ssot.json change exists solely to register this story doc and its spec doc mirror under the vibepro-agent-guidance-ssot design root — splitting it would leave the story PR failing gate:design_ssot_reconciliation and the registration PR referencing docs absent from main. The child_links backfill of other roots is deterministic CLI normalization, declared in the story boundary. Total diff is 5 files / docs-only.

decisions.summary: human closure of needs_human_judgment on axis:release_ops (head 8901e58)
decisions.reason: Internal agent-operating docs (skills/*.md) only; no deployed runtime, no end-user release surface. rollback_instruction: single git revert of the one docs commit restores the previous Skill text (story frontmatter reason.rollback). release_note: PR body itself serves as the change notice to the only consumers. No operator communication or observability_evidence applies because no running system changes.
decisions.reviewer: k.sato (coordinator-recorded per autonomous execution policy; PR merge remains human-gated)

decisions.reason: release_note: the PR body serves as the change notice to the only consumers (agents/maintainers). rollback_instruction: single git revert of the one docs commit, declared in story frontmatter reason.rollback and the spec doc mirror. observability_evidence: e2e-flow-replay.json and guard-check artifacts provide owner-visible evidence; no running system changes. No operator action is required.

contract_doc: no public CLI/API/config/output contract is touched — the diff contains only skills/*.md, the story doc, the spec doc mirror, and design-ssot.json registration; no src/ change. compat_or_output_test: ac-verify.json (27 checks) verifies the docs describe the existing vibepro adjudicate/guard command contracts accurately, and e2e-flow-replay.json confirms live CLI output matches the documented contract.
